home.content: André Luiz Alexandrini, 37 years old. I'm living in Bangkok, Thailand.
I'm a bachelor's in Information Systems(2012) and I'm working with this area since 2010.
Nowadays, I'm working as a full-stack senior developer in a international company in Portugal, and I develop websites, games and Apps just for fun.
I worked with support customer, manager of support customer and Web Designer.
JavaScript | TypeScript | Node.js | NestJS | Next.js | React | AngularJS | MongoDB | PostgreSQL | SQL Server | Docker

about.content: I’m a Senior Full Stack Developer with over 15 years of experience building web platforms using JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, Next.js, and other technologies. I work across the full delivery cycle - requirements, prototyping, implementation, and maintenance - with a strong focus on security, readability, and long-term maintainability.

content: Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, AngularJS
Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MySQL
DevOps & CI/CD: Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub CI/CD
Quality & Maintainability: TDD, automated testing, refactoring, secure coding practices

Insurance B2B/B2C Platforms (bolttech): Developed and maintained insurance products using NestJS, NextJS, and MongoDB, delivering partner-specific (white-label) UI/UX and features for both end customers (B2C) and insurance agents (B2B).

B2B Product Built from Scratch: Took a product from initial discovery and prototyping to production, aligning implementation with requirements and ensuring the codebase remained easy to evolve as the business grew.
Offline-First Mobile Sales App: Built a hybrid mobile app for sales teams with offline mode and data synchronization, enabling consistent usage in low-connectivity environments.

Beyond coding, I’m known for clear communication, strong ownership, and a direct approach to problem-solving. I collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, contribute to brainstorming and unblocking complex issues.

about.content: Let’s connect and discuss collaboration opportunities!
